title: Write your own speculator
tagline: In Pie the speculative decoding loop is user code. Write your own drafting mechanism, ship it with the request, and run draft and verify in one forward pass. The drafter here is a prompt-lookup table.
question: Refactor the Python class: rename the field `total` to `subtotal` everywhere it appears.

naive.label: Naive
naive.sublabel: vanilla one token per step — about 311 tok/s

events.value: tokens drip out at the GPU's per-token cadence

pie.label: Pie
pie.sublabel: prompt-lookup drafter + verify in one forward pass — multi-token bursts

events.value: drafter proposes K tokens from prompt suffixes; verifier accepts a run per round
high prompt overlap — drafter accepts long runs
133 tokens  •  about 93 ms  •  about 1,430 tok/s  •  64% draft accept
